name: Enterprise Zone Facility Bonds

eligibility.description: Businesses must operate within a designated Empowerment Zone (extended through 2025) and meet specific employee residency and asset tests.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the issuance of tax-exempt bonds to finance 'enterprise zone facilities' for 'enterprise zone businesses' in designated empowerment zones or enterprise communities.
